entry.title: Curling help, just the way you need it
entry.summary: As our sport grows, you need every competitive advantage you can get. Our goal is to offer solutions to improve your game, as…
entry.content:
As our sport grows, you need every competitive advantage you can get. Our goal is to offer solutions to improve your game, as a grassroots recreational curler. We're also working on solutions to help curling clubs with their recreational leagues and issues like pace of play.

We're just starting out and we've got big plans. Check back often to see what's new.

Our first offering will be our solution to address "pace of play", but we won't stop there.
